# Example Diskette16 cart source
name Starter Cart
script main
title Starter Cart
fill 0
set 3 3 2
set 4 3 2
set 5 3 2
set 3 4 2
set 3 5 2
print Hello from Diskette16
end_script
script player
print player script
end_script
tile 2 main
entity hero 6 6 1 main player
map
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
end
